title: Story Mode Music Discs
description: Adds music discs from Minecraft: Story Mode into Minecraft: Java Edition!
body:
![MOD LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30338bc19e8d8cc0b25b3a7ab966f7562d321394.png) Bring the iconic **Minecraft: Story Mode** soundtrack into **Minecraft: Java Edition**! This mod adds a multitude of new music discs, a new villager profession, and new crafting recipes. View the tracklist at the bottom of the page! > **Current Version: 1.5.0**
> **Forge 1.20.1**
> **Created with MCreator** --- ## New Villager Profession: Musician Turn any villager into a **musician** by placing a jukebox! The Musician trades different OSTs depending on their profession level: | Villager Level | Offered Discs | |----------------|-------------| | **Novice** | Season 1, Episode 1 | | **Apprentice** | Season 1, Episode 2 | | **Journeyman** | Season 1, Episode 3 | | **Expert** | Season 1, Episode 4 + | | **Master** | Rare and key soundtrack discs | --- ## New Items and Recipes ### Disc Fragment **Recipe:** Place **Paper** above **Flint** in the crafting grid. --- ### Empty Record **Recipe:** Put **Paper** in the center, surrounded by **Disc Fragments**. --- ### New Jukebox Recipe Now crafted using an **Empty Record** instead of a diamond! This replaces the original recipe that required a diamond. > *These changes are made so that people can easily obtain their favorite tracks. :)* --- ## Tracklist *(More tracks will be added in future updates.)*
All Tracks | Track | Episode | |-------|----------| | No More Creepers (Instrumental #3) | Episode 1 | | Order of the Stone | Episode 1 | | Automatic Chicken Farm | Episode 1 | | Training Montage | Episode 1 | | Stone By Stone | Episode 1 | | Ocelot Mob | Episode 1 | | Action Suspense | Episode 1 | | Spiders! | Episode 1 | | Pale Blue Dot | Episode 1 | | 101 Credits | Episode 1 | | Ivor Theme | Episode 1 | | Endercon DJ | Episode 1 | | Wither Storm Theme | Episode 1 | | Lapis Lazuli | Episode 1 | | Map Room | Episode 1 | | Reuben | Episode 1 | | Boomtown Suite | Episode 2 | | Magnus Theme | Episode 2 | | Redstonia Credits | Episode 2 | | Redstonia Freewalk | Episode 2 | | Dome of Concentration | Episode 2 | | Command Block | Episode 2 | | Ivor Fight | Episode 2 | | Repeater | Episode 2 | | Mob Grinder (Credits) | Episode 3 | | Further Back | Episode 3 | | Redstone Baby | Episode 3 | | First Suit Up | Episode 3 | | Soren Theme | Episode 3 | | Dark Sky | Episode 3 | | Wither Rises | Episode 3 | | Cave | Episode 4 | | 104 Credits | Episode 4 | | Witches | Episode 4 | | Jitter | Episode 4 | | Atop the Maze | Episode 4 | | Four Heroes | Episode 4 | | Wither Destroyed | Episode 4 | | Don’t Be Toasted, Reuben | Episode 4 | | Theme (Reprise) | Episode 4 | | Wither Storm Theme (Complete) | Episode 4 | | New Order | Episode 5 | | Jungle Biome | Episode 5 | | Blaze Rods | Episode 5 | | Skyland | Episode 5 | | Aiden in Skyland | Episode 5 | | Milo | Episode 5 | | Showdown in Skyland | Episode 5 | | What Goes Around | Episode 5 | | 106 Credits | Episode 6 | | Detective Jesse | Episode 6 | | Red Crosses | Episode 6 | | 107 Credits | Episode 7 | | Badlands | Episode 7 | | Pama | Episode 7 | | Harper | Episode 7 | | Harper's Lab | Episode 7 | | Access Denied | Episode 7 | | 108 Credits | Episode 8 | | Survival | Episode 8 | | The Old Builders | Episode 8 | | Sport Central | Episode 8 | | The Finishing Blow | Episode 8 | | Sports Finale | Episode 8 |
**All music composed by Antimo & Welles.** _All rights belong to the original creators._
